profile.name: Meenal Pande
profile.headline: Independent Software Consultant | Backend & Distributed Systems | Ex-Microsoft, Tencent
profile.about: Recent UC Berkeley EECS graduate specializing in scalable backend architectures and distributed systems. 2+ years of experience building high-throughput services via internships and consulting. Passionate about cloud infrastructure, DevOps pipelines, and writing clean, maintainable Go and Python code.

experience.title: Independent Technical Consultant
experience.description: Architecting backend microservices for early-stage SaaS startups using Go, Docker, and PostgreSQL. Implementing full CI/CD deployment pipelines to streamline engineering velocity.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Developed internal dashboard tools to monitor Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) cluster health. Built automated testing scripts in Python to improve platform reliability.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Designed high-volume data ingestion pipelines for gaming telemetry using C++ and Node.js.

education.degree: B.S. Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences (EECS)
